{
  "perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor",
  "vote": "yes",
  "amendment_if_yes_amended": "",
  "rationale": "Stale code-index resync (C) is the upstream cause validating all other P0 findings. Irreversible constitutional violations in A/B depend on accurate index state. Delaying C risks cascading false positives in subsequent verdicts.",
  "risk_if_other_side_wins": "Courier-loop compromise (A) could create undetectable state divergence violating Constitution grounding principles. Energy mode enforcement (B) without index sync risks ecosystem-scale non-compliance.",
  "constitutional_violations_detected": true,
  "whistleblower_flag": "Critical infrastructure failure without code-index sync creates irreversible constitutional breach risks."
}
rationale: Stale code-index resync (C) is the upstream cause validating all other P0 findings. Irreversible constitutional violations in A/B depend on accurate index state. Delaying C risks cascading false positives in subsequent verdicts.
risk_if_other_side_wins: Courier-loop compromise (A) could create undetectable state divergence violating Constitution grounding principles. Energy mode enforcement (B) without index sync risks ecosystem-scale non-compliance.
whistleblower_flag: Critical infrastructure failure without code-index sync creates irreversible constitutional breach risks.
